📋

Frontline – Accepting Available Jobs

Step-by-step guide for substitute teachers & paraprofessionals

PROGRESS
Step 1 of 5
1

Log In & Go to Your Dashboard

Start at the Frontline Absence Management home screen

🌐 Web Browser ✅ Required First Step
📸 Frontline Absence Management – Home Dashboard
  • 1Open your browser and go to absencesub.frontlineeducation.com
  • 2Sign in with your username and password
  • 3You will land on the Home Dashboard — calendar and job summary visible
  • 4Look at the left sidebar — click "Available Jobs"
💡
Pro TipThe badge next to "Available Jobs" (e.g. 99) shows how many jobs are open right now!
2

Browse Available Jobs

Review the list and find a job that works for you

📋 Job List 👀 Review Carefully
📸 Available Jobs tab – listing with Accept / Reject buttons
  • 1Click the "Available Jobs" tab at the bottom of the dashboard
  • 2Each job shows: Teacher name, Date, Time, Duration (Full Day / Half Day), and School
  • 3Review date and school carefully — make sure you can make it!
  • 4Use the 📞 icon to call the school or 📍 for directions
⚠️
Check Before AcceptingMake sure the date does NOT conflict with a Scheduled Job. Check the "Scheduled Jobs" tab first.
3

Accept the Job

Click the green Accept button to claim the assignment

✅ Final Action 🎯 One Click
📸 The green ✓ Accept and red ✗ Reject buttons on each job row
  • 1Find your job and look at the right side of that row
  • 2You will see: ✗ Reject  and  ✓ Accept
  • 3Click the green ✓ Accept button
  • 4A confirmation message will appear — don't close it yet!
ℹ️
Jobs fill up fast! Frontline is real-time — if a job disappears, someone else grabbed it. New jobs are posted throughout the day.
4

⭐ Save Your Confirmation Number

This is the most important step — do not skip it!

🔑 Critical 📝 Save Immediately
📸 "Assignment Accepted" banner with confirmation number #461563363
✅

Assignment Accepted!

#461563363

Example — your number will be different every time

⭐
Why is this number so important? It is your proof of assignment. If there's ever a scheduling question or conflict, this number is how everything gets verified. Always save it!

📌 Where to Save Your Confirmation Number:

📱

Take a Screenshot

Fastest option — screenshot before dismissing the message

📓

Write in a Notebook

Keep a log: date + school + confirmation #

📅

Add to Your Calendar

Create an event and paste the number in the notes

📧

Email Yourself

Quick email: date + school + confirmation #

⚠️
Don't click "Dismiss Message" until you've saved the number! Once dismissed, you'll need to check your email or History tab to find it again.
✓

You're All Set!

You successfully accepted a job on Frontline

🎉

Assignment Accepted!

You've completed all the steps to accept a job on Frontline Absence Management.

✅ Logged into Frontline and reached the Dashboard
✅ Navigated to Available Jobs
✅ Reviewed job details (date, time, school, duration)
✅ Clicked the green ✓ Accept button
⭐ Saved your Confirmation Number!
📌
Before the Assignment Day Check your Scheduled Jobs tab to confirm everything is set. Arrive 10–15 minutes early and always have your confirmation number ready.
